subcodes.first_line: O God, within Thy grasp lie the reins of all created things, and in Thy right hand is held dominion over all power and might. There is none [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من فی قبضتک زمام الموجودات و فی یمینک ملاک القدره و الاقتدار ما من
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @human reality created in the image of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom
